affected_pattern: Missing TotalCharges for prepaid subscribers only; postpaid unaffected
root_cause: OCS (Online Charging System) unavailability — the prepaid real-time charging system was in maintenance mode, causing prepaid billing records to be diverted to a quarantine queue that downstream invoicing never read.
supporting_evidence: Billing Record Failure RCA Playbook: OCS Maintenance Quarantine Backlog pattern
OCS maintenance window aligns with the failure interval
Quarantine queue depth spiked and remained elevated
recommended_action: Replay quarantined prepaid billing records through OCS post-maintenance
Rate and bill the replayed events with appropriate adjustment
Add quarantine-queue depth alerting with SLO
